title: Import Multiple/Batch Columns at Once

posts.author: a_ward (Aston Ward)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add columns to a board in bulk - i.e. instead of adding each column manually one-by-one, can they be imported or added in one go?

For example this could be achieved during an excel import - rather than having to manually create all the columns first and then import a csv/xlsx and mapping the columns again one-by-one, could it not just create the columns in bulk using the file’s own columns?
